articles.title: Rising concerns over India’s LPG supply: Causes, constraints & market implications
articles.description: Rising geopolitical tensions in West Asia and disruptions near the Strait of Hormuz are raising concerns over India’s LPG supply. With tanker movement slowing and imports falling, the government has prioritised household distribution and boosted domestic production while exploring alternative sources to cushion the impact of supply constraints.

articles.title: India revisits Press Note 3: Key clarifications to FDI framework for investments from land-bordering countries
articles.description: India has clarified key aspects of the Press Note 3 framework governing investments from land-bordering countries, introducing a 10% beneficial ownership threshold and time-bound approvals for select sectors. The changes aim to reduce regulatory uncertainty while balancing national security concerns with the need to facilitate foreign investment.

articles.title: Bitcoin hovers near $71,000 as crypto investors track macro and liquidity signals
articles.description: Bitcoin hovered near $71,000 on Saturday as investors tracked macroeconomic cues and liquidity signals ahead of the upcoming US Federal Reserve policy decision. While Bitcoin and Ethereum saw minor declines in the past 24 hours, major altcoins were mostly lower, with Tron standing out as the only notable gainer.

articles.title: Why the govt decided to release Sonam Wangchuk, what it earlier said on him and Ladakh agitation: Explained
articles.description: The MHA decision came while the Supreme Court has been hearing a habeas corpus petition challenging his incarceration since September last year.

articles.title: Pak's biggest export is terrorism, US shouldn't be cosying up to it: Trump aide
articles.description: Paks biggest export is terrorism US shouldnt be cosying up to it Trump aide

topStories.description: The missile attack causes damage to the mission, according to sources, as smoke is seen rising from the building.

topStories.title: North Korea Launches Suspected Ballistic Missile, Japan Says
topStories.description: The firing comes as annual US-South Korea military drills are taking place from March 9 to 19. North Korea has long bristled at the drills as a war rehearsal.

topStories.title: North Korea fires about 10 missiles toward sea in show of force, says South Korea
topStories.description: The Freedom Shield exercise, running through March 19, tests U.S.-South Korea military capabilities. North Korea fired 10 ballistic missiles in response, while the U.S. and South Korea conduct their annual drills, raising tensions amid ongoing regional security challenges.

topStories.title: Hyundai Palisade SUV Sales Halted After Fatal Accident Kills Child
topStories.description: The recall issued by the brand will affect nearly 68,500 Hyundai Palisade SUVs, among which 60,000 units are in the US, while the other 8,000 are in Canada.

topStories.title: US attacks military sites on Iran’s Kharg Island, home to vast oil facility
topStories.description: Tehran threatens to reduce US-linked oil facilities to 'pile of ashes' if oil structures on the island are targeted.

topStories.title: ‘Totally defeated’ Iran wants a deal, claims Trump after two weeks of Operation Epic Fury — ‘Not a deal that I would...’
topStories.description: Iran's Fars news agency reported at least 15 explosions with thick smoke rising over Kharg Island, earlier hit by US strikes.

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 15 of US-Israel attacks?
topStories.description: US hits Iran’s Kharg island as it warns oil sites may be next if Tehran disrupts shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Smoke seen rising from US embassy in Baghdad
topStories.description: Videos posted by social media users showed smoke rising from the US embassy in Baghdad after a reported attack.

topStories.title: Opposition leaders press government, Lok Sabha Speaker to revoke the suspension of 8 MPs
topStories.description: The eight MPs, including seven from the Congress, have been barred from attending the remainder of the Budget Session

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: US Embassy in Iraq's Baghdad attacked — Watch video
dailyNews.description: US Embassy Baghdad: With the war nearing its second week, Iraq faces escalating violence and economic turmoil due to attacks on oil infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: PM Modi steps up attack on Congress in poll-bound Assam: ‘Used rifts for selfish politics’
dailyNews.description: PM Modi further accused the Congress of spreading rumours and misinformation about the ongoing global crisis caused by the war in West Asia.

dailyNews.title: Trump claims US ‘way ahead of schedule’ in Iran war
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump said the United States is “way ahead of schedule” in its war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: What are the changes being proposed to Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Act, 2019 | Explained
dailyNews.description: How is the government proposing to alter the definition of “transgender person”? Why has it argued for the omission of the right to “self-perceived gender identity”? What about the proposed changes have raised concerns among the trans community? What has the Supreme Court laid down in the landmark 2014 judgement recognising a third gender beyond male and female and the right to self-determination of gender identity?

dailyNews.title: Los Angeles asks for investigation into LA28 Olympics chief over Epstein ties
dailyNews.description: The LA city council voted unanimously for an investigation into LA28 chief Casey Wasserman over his Epstein ties.

dailyNews.title: Experts doubt Hegseth claim no need to ‘worry about’ Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Experts doubt Pete Hegseth’s claims that the US is working effectively to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: US Army awards $20 billion contract to Anduril to supply innovative defence technologies
dailyNews.description: The US Army awarded Anduril Industries a contract worth up to $20 billion for software, hardware, and services aimed at enhancing technology delivery to soldiers.

dailyNews.title: Iran arranges charter plane to repatriate crew of warship Iris Lavan docked in Kochi
dailyNews.description: The special charter flight is also carrying the bodies of Iranian sailors who were killed when IRIS Dena was attacked by the US near Sri Lanka on March 4.

dailyNews.title: After ‘emotional’ post, Cong leaders say MP remains loyal to party
dailyNews.description: Senior Congress leaders believe K Sudhakaran will follow party orders despite his emotional Facebook post expressing a desire to contest the Kannur assembly elections.

dailyNews.title: USA beats Canada in World Baseball Classic to maintain American sports dominance over northern neighbor
dailyNews.description: Team USA defeats Canada 5-3 in 2026 World Baseball Classic quarterfinals, marking the third U.S. victory over Canada in major international competition in the past month.

dailyNews.title: Vance touts Trump economy gains during North Carolina tour, cites rising home purchases
dailyNews.description: VP JD Vance claims economy improving in North Carolina campaign visit, touts rising home purchases and falling rents while campaigning for GOP candidates.

topStories.description: A Colorado school district was found by U.S. Department of Education to be in violation of Title IX for allegedly allowing male students access to female bathrooms and girls sports.

topStories.title: Vance reveals $19B fraud uncovered in Minneapolis, hints California is next target
topStories.description: JD Vance alleges $19 billion in fraud was discovered in Minneapolis, and the Trump administration may target California for its next major federal investigation.

topStories.description: Rodeo buckle winners visited the White House for the first time in more than four decades when President Donald Trump hosted PRCA and WPRA world champions.

topStories.description: The White House press secretary denied a CNN report claiming the Trump team was unprepared for the potential Iranian closure of the Strait of Hormuz, calling it "fake news."

topStories.title: Trump Kennedy Center's new leader revealed as Ric Grenell exits top role
topStories.description: Ric Grenell is stepping down as the Trump Kennedy Center president as the venue shifts focus to major renovations. VP Matt Floca is taking over leadership.

topStories.description: Cuba confirmed talks with the Trump administration amid an economic crisis after Venezuela oil was cut off. President Miguel Díaz-Canel cites aim to resolve differences.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Move to Seize Oil Tankers Costs the U.S. Tens of Millions of Dollars
dailyNews.description: Although President Trump said seizing tankers would be a financial boon, the cost of maintaining just one aging ship has already reached $47 million.

dailyNews.title: More Marines and Warships Being Sent to Middle East, U.S. Officials Say
dailyNews.description: Iran’s response to days of aerial bombardment and long-range artillery strikes has proved more resilient than Trump administration officials anticipated.

dailyNews.title: Judge Quashes Justice Dept.’s Subpoenas of Fed, Crippling Its Pursuit of Trump’s Rivals
dailyNews.description: Judge James E. Boasberg derided the U.S. attorney’s office in Washington for pursuing a case against Jerome H. Powell that appeared to be motivated by President Trump’s desire for vengeance.

dailyNews.title: Kennedy Center’s President, Richard Grenell, Is Leaving After a Tumultuous Year
dailyNews.description: Since Richard Grenell was appointed by President Trump, the arts center has endured waves of cancellations and departures. It will soon close for lengthy renovations.

dailyNews.title: Judge Temporarily Blocks Trump Demand for Student Race Data
dailyNews.description: A group of Democratic attorneys general had sued to overturn the Trump administration’s new policy that demanded the past seven years of student application data.

dailyNews.title: TikTok Investors Set to Pay $10 Billion Fee to Trump Administration
dailyNews.description: The large fee is the latest example of the White House’s inserting itself into corporate deal making in unusual and aggressive ways.

dailyNews.title: With Endorsement, Trump Clears Oklahoma Senate Path
dailyNews.description: The move, as other Republicans confirmed they would not run, all but assured Representative Kevin Hern would succeed Senator Markwayne Mullin.

dailyNews.title: 3/5: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: President Trump ousts Kristi Noem as DHS Secretary; Trump picks Sen. Mullin (R-OK) to replace Noem

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. attacked vital Iranian oil hub, as war reaches 2-week mark
dailyNews.description: President Trump said that the U.S. military had conducted "one of the most power bombing raids" on Iran's Kharg Island, a vital oil hub for the country.

dailyNews.title: DOJ moves to drop charges against man who burned American flag outside White House
dailyNews.description: Jan Carey was facing two misdemeanor criminal counts in Washington, D.C., federal court.

dailyNews.title: From the archives: Richard Nixon addresses the 1973 energy crisis
dailyNews.description: Then-President Richard Nixon addressed the nation from the Oval Office during the 1973 energy crisis. Fueled by the Yom Kippur War, members of the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries in the Middle East banned the sale of oil to the U.S. and other countries, sharply raising gas prices for Americans as they faced their first fuel shortage since WWII.

dailyNews.title: Democrats seek clarity on Epstein accountant's statements on Trump accuser
dailyNews.description: Richard Kahn, who worked closely with Epstein for more than a decade, testified before the Oversight Committee on Wednesday.
